elements.name: Source
texts: Gibbons, Margaret, Guide to St. Patrick’s Purgatory, Lough Derg, pp. 24-30

elements.name: Rights
texts: Citation for the purposes of criticism

elements.name: Text
texts: AD 1638 - Letter of Henrietta Maria, the Catholic Queen of Charles I, to Lord Deputy Wentworth to have the pilgrimage re-opened. (During the six years of suppression the people came as usual, and, kneeling on the shore recited the prayers of the exercises)
